title: Contributor Code of Conduct
text: contributors maintainers project, pledge respect people contribute reporting issues, posting feature requests, updating documentation, submitting pull requests patches, activities. committed making participation project harassment-free experience everyone, regardless level experience, gender, gender identity expression, sexual orientation, disability, personal appearance, body size, race, ethnicity, age, religion. Examples unacceptable behavior participants include use sexual language imagery, derogatory comments personal attacks, trolling, public private harassment, insults, unprofessional conduct. Project maintainers right responsibility remove, edit, reject comments, commits, code, wiki edits, issues, contributions aligned Code Conduct. Project maintainers follow Code Conduct may removed project team. Instances abusive, harassing, otherwise unacceptable behavior may reported opening issue contacting one project maintainers. Code Conduct adapted Contributor Covenant (https://www.contributor-covenant.org), version 1.0.0, available https://contributor-covenant.org/version/1/0/0/.

what: Quick instructions for AI coding agents working on ggsegSchaefer
title: Quick instructions for AI coding agents working on ggsegSchaefer
text: ggseg 2.0 atlas package providing brain atlas data ggseg ecosystem. data-package custom functions.

title: Quick instructions for AI coding agents working on ggsegSchaefer
text: data/*.rda — Unified ggseg_atlas objects (2D + 3D one object) R/data.R — Roxygen2 documentation atlas R/ggsegSchaefer-package.R — Package-level docs, imports ggseg.formats R/sysdata.rda — Internal palette data (brain_pals) data-raw/ — Scripts generated/converted atlas data

title: Quick instructions for AI coding agents working on ggsegSchaefer
text: package depends ggseg.formats provides ggseg_atlas class. atlas objects work ggseg::geom_brain() (2D) ggseg3d::ggseg3d() (3D).

title: Quick instructions for AI coding agents working on ggsegSchaefer
text: Update docs: devtools::document() Run tests: devtools::test() (testthat edition 3, describe/style) Full check: devtools::check() Build pkgdown site: pkgdown::build_site()

title: Quick instructions for AI coding agents working on ggsegSchaefer
text: code comments except necessary workarounds Roxygen2 markdown enabled Tests use describe/BDD style vdiffr visual regression NEWS.md tracks user-facing changes (CI/pkgdown changes) URLs point ggseg GitHub org (LCBC-UiO)

what: Schaefer Atlas for the ggsegverse Ecosystem
title: Schaefer Atlas for the ggsegverse Ecosystem
text: package contains Schaefer cortical atlas ggseg ecosystem. Includes 7-network 17-network parcellations resolutions 100 1000 parcels.

title: Schaefer Atlas for the ggsegverse Ecosystem
text: recommend installing ggseg-atlases ggseg r-universe: can install package GitHub :
code: options(repos = c(   ggseg = "https://ggseg.r-universe.dev",   CRAN = "https://cloud.r-project.org" ))  install.packages("ggsegSchaefer") # install.packages("pak") pak::pak("ggsegverse/ggsegSchaefer")

title: Schaefer Atlas for the ggsegverse Ecosystem
code: library(ggseg) library(ggsegSchaefer)  plot(schaefer7_400())

title: Schaefer Atlas for the ggsegverse Ecosystem
code: plot(schaefer17_400())

title: Schaefer Atlas for the ggsegverse Ecosystem
text: Schaefer , Kong R, Gordon EM, Laumann , Zuo XN, Holmes AJ, Eickhoff SB, & Yeo BTT (2018). Local-global parcellation human cerebral cortex intrinsic functional connectivity MRI. Cerebral Cortex, 28(9), 3095-3114.

what: ggsegSchaefer: Schaefer Atlas for the 'ggsegverse' Ecosystem — ggsegSchaefer-package
title: ggsegSchaefer: Schaefer Atlas for the 'ggsegverse' Ecosystem — ggsegSchaefer-package
text: Schaefer cortical atlas 'ggseg' ecosystem. Provides unified 'ggseg_atlas' objects 2D polygon geometry 3D vertex indices, use 'ggseg' 'ggseg3d'. Includes 7-network 17-network parcellations resolutions 100 1000 parcels.

title: ggsegSchaefer: Schaefer Atlas for the 'ggsegverse' Ecosystem — ggsegSchaefer-package
text: Maintainer: Athanasia Mo Mowinckel .m.mowinckel@psykologi.uio.(ORCID) Authors: Didac Vidal-Pineiro d.v.pineiro@psykologi.uio.(ORCID) contributors: Monica Thieu monica.thieu@columbia.edu (ORCID) [contributor]

title: Schaefer 17-Network 100-Parcel Atlas — schaefer17_100
text: Brain atlas Schaefer et al. (2018) local-global parcellation human cerebral cortex 100 parcels aligned 17 resting-state networks (Yeo et al., 2011). Contains 2D polygon geometry ggseg::geom_brain() 3D vertex indices ggseg3d::ggseg3d().

title: Schaefer 17-Network 100-Parcel Atlas — schaefer17_100
code: schaefer17_100()

title: Schaefer 17-Network 100-Parcel Atlas — schaefer17_100
text: ggseg.formats::ggseg_atlas object (cortical).

title: Schaefer 17-Network 100-Parcel Atlas — schaefer17_100
text: Schaefer , et al. (2018). "Local-Global Parcellation Human Cerebral Cortex Intrinsic Functional Connectivity MRI." Cerebral Cortex, 28(9):3095-3114. doi:10.1093/cercor/bhx179

title: Schaefer 17-Network 100-Parcel Atlas — schaefer17_100
code: schaefer17_100() #>  #> ── schaefer17_100 ggseg atlas ────────────────────────────────────────────────── #> Type: cortical #> Regions: 100 #> Hemispheres: left, right #> Views: inferior, lateral, superior, medial #> Palette: ✔ #> Rendering: ✔ ggseg #> ✔ ggseg3d (vertices) #> ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── #>    hemi                           region                               label #> 1  left    17Networks_LH_VisCent_ExStr_1    lh_17Networks_LH_VisCent_ExStr_1 #> 2  left    17Networks_LH_VisCent_ExStr_2    lh_17Networks_LH_VisCent_ExStr_2 #> 3  left  17Networks_LH_VisCent_Striate_1  lh_17Networks_LH_VisCent_Striate_1 #> 4  left    17Networks_LH_VisCent_ExStr_3    lh_17Networks_LH_VisCent_ExStr_3 #> 5  left 17Networks_LH_VisPeri_ExStrInf_1 lh_17Networks_LH_VisPeri_ExStrInf_1 #> 6  left  17Networks_LH_VisPeri_StriCal_1  lh_17Networks_LH_VisPeri_StriCal_1 #> 7  left 17Networks_LH_VisPeri_ExStrSup_1 lh_17Networks_LH_VisPeri_ExStrSup_1 #> 8  left          17Networks_LH_SomMotA_1          lh_17Networks_LH_SomMotA_1 #> 9  left          17Networks_LH_SomMotA_2          lh_17Networks_LH_SomMotA_2 #> 10 left      17Networks_LH_SomMotB_Aud_1      lh_17Networks_LH_SomMotB_Aud_1 #> ... with 90 more rows if (FALSE) plot(schaefer17_100()) # \dontrun{}

text: Schaefer , et al. (2018). "Local-Global Parcellation Human Cerebral Cortex Intrinsic Functional Connectivity MRI." Cerebral Cortex, 28(9):3095-3114. doi:10.1093/cercor/bhx179

title: Schaefer 7-Network 900-Parcel Atlas — schaefer7_900
code: schaefer7_900() #>  #> ── schaefer7_900 ggseg atlas ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── #> Type: cortical #> Regions: 900 #> Hemispheres: left, right #> Views: inferior, lateral, superior, medial #> Palette: ✔ #> Rendering: ✔ ggseg #> ✔ ggseg3d (vertices) #> ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── #>    hemi              region                  label #> 1  left  7Networks_LH_Vis_1  lh_7Networks_LH_Vis_1 #> 2  left  7Networks_LH_Vis_2  lh_7Networks_LH_Vis_2 #> 3  left  7Networks_LH_Vis_3  lh_7Networks_LH_Vis_3 #> 4  left  7Networks_LH_Vis_4  lh_7Networks_LH_Vis_4 #> 5  left  7Networks_LH_Vis_5  lh_7Networks_LH_Vis_5 #> 6  left  7Networks_LH_Vis_6  lh_7Networks_LH_Vis_6 #> 7  left  7Networks_LH_Vis_7  lh_7Networks_LH_Vis_7 #> 8  left  7Networks_LH_Vis_8  lh_7Networks_LH_Vis_8 #> 9  left  7Networks_LH_Vis_9  lh_7Networks_LH_Vis_9 #> 10 left 7Networks_LH_Vis_10 lh_7Networks_LH_Vis_10 #> ... with 890 more rows if (FALSE) plot(schaefer7_900()) # \dontrun{}

title: ggsegSchaefer 2.0.3
text: Atlas 2D geometry migrated sf-optional brain_polygons format (ggseg.formats 0.0.3). atlases now render without sf GDAL/GEOS/PROJ system libraries, enabling wasm air-gapped installs. Plots unchanged.

title: ggsegSchaefer 2.0.0
text: 20 Schaefer atlas objects (schaefer7_100 schaefer7_1000 schaefer17_100 schaefer17_1000) now ggseg_atlas objects (ggseg.formats) containing 2D 3D data. separate _3d objects removed. Use ggplot() + ggseg::geom_brain(atlas = schaefer7_400) 2D plots ggseg3d::ggseg3d(atlas = schaefer7_400) 3D plots – object. ggseg.formats now hard dependency (Depends). Package URLs updated LCBC-UiO ggseg GitHub organisation.
